title: Utopia SMP
description: Built for UtopiaSMP: keep it vanilla, just better. Small mods, big polish, perfect for multiplayer survival.
body:
# The Official UtopiaSMP modpack
![UtopiaSMPheader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7d733bda9fc3d2c0fb10a3c298387920a61a427.png)
UtopiaSMP is a vanilla-friendly modpack designed for our survival multiplayer server. It keeps the core Minecraft experience fully intact while enhancing it with small quality-of-life tweaks, aesthetic upgrades, and lightweight performance improvements.
If you love the feel of vanilla but want smoother gameplay, prettier visuals, and a few smart conveniences, feel free to try it out. This pack will receive regular updates as things get added or new versions are released.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
## **Quality-of-Life & Aesthetic Upgrades**

- Immersive Paintings – Create and place custom paintings directly in-game.

- Elytra Trims – Personalize your Elytra wings with armor-style trims.

- Right Click Harvest – Simple crop re-harvesting without breaking immersion.

- Mo Glass – Adds stained glass panes and more decorative transparency options.

- Visual Workbench – Keep crafting grids visible between sessions.

- Presence Footsteps – Realistic sound feedback as you move across different blocks.

## **Utility & Functionality**
- Sophisticated Storage – Expand and organize your inventory with upgradable chests and backpacks.

- Traveler’s Backpack – Stay mobile with functional, wearable backpacks.
  
- Bookshelf Inspector – Easily check enchantment power levels at a glance.
  
- Gravestones – Recover your items safely after death.
  
- IndyPets – Keep your pets near home without unwanted teleporting.

## **Multiplayer Essentials**
- Simple Voice Chat – Built-in proximity voice chat for natural communication on the SMP.
  
- VinURL – Create your own music discs to share your wonderful tastes.

## **Performance & Compatibility**
- Sodium, Iris & Sound Physics Remastered – Modern rendering and lighting improvements for smoother performance and immersive sound.
  
- Leaves Be Gone & Not Enough Animations – Minor visual polish without straying from vanilla charm.
  
- Vivecraft Support – Optional VR play for a more immersive experience.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
## **Intended Use**
This modpack was built for the UtopiaSMP community, but anyone looking for a clean, optimized vanilla-plus experience is welcome to use it.

UtopiaSMP’s goal is to enrich, not reinvent Minecraft. Every mod has been chosen to:

- Preserve vanilla gameplay and balance
- Improve atmosphere, immersion, and convenience
- Remain light enough for smooth multiplayer performance

Whether you’re farming, exploring, or building, the world feels like vanilla, just a bit more alive.
